title: woof gate front-matter
description: YAML front-matter of .woof/epics/E<N>/gate.md. Validates the structured header only; the prose sections (## Context, ## Findings, ## Claude's position) are unconstrained markdown.

type.description: plan_gate (Stage 4, always opens) vs story_gate (Stage 6, opens conditionally on Stage 5 check failure or critique blocker).

stage.description: Stage that wrote the gate. Coupled to type: plan_gate=4, story_gate=6 (enforced by allOf below).

story_id.description: Story this gate is for. Required (non-null) when type=story_gate; null when type=plan_gate.

triggered_by.description: Reasons the gate opened. plan_review fires automatically at Stage 4 (gate always opens). check_1..check_8 map to Stage 5 deterministic failure classes A..H. Driver-level: timeout, subprocess_crash (with exit_code), codex_unreachable, incomplete_subprocess (re-entry from in_progress without gate). schema_validation_failed when Stage 3 self-validation exhausts the 2-attempt cap. manual for human-opened gates.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when gate.md was written.

exit_code.description: Subprocess exit code. Required when triggered_by contains subprocess_crash; absent otherwise.

harness_session_id.description: CC session UUID or Codex audit-file path of the subprocess that caused the gate. Optional; populated when relevant for audit linkage.
